name: quota-usage
title: Quota Usage
description: The extension is used to quickly look up how much of my Codex and Amp Free quota I have left.
author: nocdn

commands.name: check-usage
commands.title: Check Usage
commands.subtitle: See usage for Amp and Codex
commands.description: The command shows a toast of how much usage is left.

preferences.name: showCodex
preferences.title: Providers
preferences.description: Show Codex usage in the toast when manually running the command.
preferences.label: Codex

preferences.name: showAmp
preferences.description: Show Amp usage in the toast when manually running the command.
preferences.label: Amp

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
